description: Use an object near you. Each object in your perception's nearby_objects carries an interactions list — pick one by id. For example, a Refrigerator might offer {id: 0, name: 'Have a Snack'}. Choose based on what you want to do.

args.name: sim_id
args.description: PersistID of the interacting Sim (your own persist_id)

args.name: interaction_id
args.description: Interaction id from the object's interactions list
